infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Eve Rides uses your location while you browse nearby rides and during active rentals.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Eve Rides requires always-on access during active rentals for live trip tracking and safety.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: Eve Rides uses motion activity to improve ride-time tracking reliability and battery efficiency during active rentals.
